scripts.dev: node scripts/parcel-dev.mjs src/index.html src/catalogs.html src/viewer.html --open index.html
scripts.dev:catalogs: node scripts/parcel-dev.mjs src/catalogs.html src/viewer.html src/index.html --open catalogs.html
scripts.dev:full: node scripts/use-catalogs-full.mjs && node scripts/parcel-dev.mjs src/catalogs.html src/viewer.html src/index.html --open catalogs.html
scripts.build:tap: parcel build src/viewer.html --public-url ./ --dist-dir dist-tap && node scripts/copy-public-to-dist.mjs dist-tap
scripts.build:catalogs: parcel build src/catalogs.html src/viewer.html --public-url ./ --dist-dir dist-all && node scripts/copy-public-to-dist.mjs dist-all
